actions.text:
⏱️ TalkPrep session timed out.

Type *prep* to start again.

✅ TalkPrep session ended.

Type *prep* to start again.

📑 *Browse Topics*

Enter a publication name (or part of it):
⚠️ No topics found for that publication.

➕ *Import Talk*

Enter the talk name or number:
⚠️ Could not import talk. Check the name/number.

🎯 *Select Talk*

Enter the talk ID number:
⚠️ Talk not found. Use *My Talks* to see available IDs.

📝 *Create Revision*

Enter the audience and style:
_Example: youth talk, encouraging tone_
⚠️ Could not create revision. Make sure you have an active talk selected.

📖 *Develop Section*

Enter the section name:
_Example: Introduction_
⚠️ Could not develop section. Create a revision first.
⚠️ Could not evaluate. Make sure you have developed sections first.
⚠️ Could not export. Develop and evaluate first.
